title: Application - Update from previous app version while using cloud account (TBD)
scenario: Cloud account user experiences issue when updating Poly Studio Mobile app from previous version
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Ensure the user is logged in with a cloud account.
Navigate to Account screen and verify the current app version.
Go to the Google Play Store and check for available updates for Poly Studio Mobile.
Install the available update for Poly Studio Mobile.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app again after the update completes.
Observe the app behavior and account status after the update.
expected: The app updates successfully. The user remains logged in with their cloud account. All settings, device pairings, and account data are preserved after the update.
